content:
🚀 odiff | Zig
🎯 Primary Use Case: Visual regression testing and identifying pixel-level differences between images, especially in automated testing pipelines.
✨ Key Features: • SIMD-first image comparison • Support for PNG, JPEG, JPG, WebP, TIFF • Cross-format comparison • Handles images with different layouts • Anti-aliasing detection
📖 Summary: Odiff is a high-performance image comparison library written in Zig, optimized with SIMD instructions for speed. It provides pixel-by-pixel difference detection for various image formats and offers both a command-line interface and Node.js bindings for integration into testing workflows.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
